testcase.name: Loginlogout

failure.message: The following asserts failed: Title not matched expected [Online Shopping site in India: Shop Online for Mobiles, Books, Watches, Shoes and More - Amazon.in] but found [Amazon Sign In]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: Title not matched expected [Online Shopping site in India: Shop Online for Mobiles, Books, Watches, Shoes and More - Amazon.in] but found [Amazon Sign In] at package1.project1_maven.TC_2LoginToAmazonAndLogout.Loginlogout(TC_2LoginToAmazonAndLogout.java:28) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 31 stack frames
